value.name: Ellora Caves
value.description: A UNESCO World Heritage Site featuring 34 rock-cut caves representing Hindu, Buddhist, and Jain monuments from 600–1000 CE.

value.name: Grishneshwar Temple
value.description: One of the 12 revered Jyotirlinga shrines of Lord Shiva in India. An important pilgrimage destination with ancient architecture.

value.name: Bibi Ka Maqbara
value.description: Known as the Taj of the Deccan, this beautiful 17th-century Mughal mausoleum was built by Prince Azam Shah in memory of his mother.

value.name: Daulatabad Fort
value.description: One of the strongest forts in India's history, built on a conical hill with a 180-degree moat and labyrinthine passages.

value.name: Bhadra Maruti Temple
value.description: Unique temple with reclining Hanuman idol. One of the few temples where Hanuman is in sleeping posture.

value.name: Panchakki (Water Mill)
value.description: A scenic 17th-century water mill powered by an underground stream. Part of the Sufi shrine complex, surrounded by beautiful gardens and a serene lake.

value.name: Khuldabad (Valley of Saints)
value.description: Historic town with tombs of Mughal emperor Aurangzeb and Sufi saints. Peaceful spiritual atmosphere.

value.name: Aurangabad Caves
value.description: 12 rock-cut Buddhist shrines dating from 3rd to 7th century. Less crowded alternative to Ajanta-Ellora.

value.name: Jama Masjid
value.description: Historic mosque built in 1612. Beautiful Indo-Islamic architecture with intricate carvings.

value.name: Salim Ali Lake & Bird Sanctuary
value.description: Peaceful lake and bird sanctuary named after famous ornithologist. Perfect for bird watching and nature walks.

value.name: Soneri Mahal (Golden Palace)
value.description: 17th-century palace with beautiful paintings and architecture. Now houses a museum.

value.name: Chhatrapati Sambhaji Maharaj Museum
value.description: Museum showcasing history and culture of Marathwada region. Artifacts, sculptures, and paintings.

value.name: Siddharth Garden & Zoo
value.description: Large garden with zoo, toy train, and boating facilities. Great for family outings.

value.name: Himayat Bagh
value.description: Historic Mughal garden with beautiful landscaping. Perfect for morning walks and picnics.
